subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath shone forth from the horizon of Manifestation with such sovereignty as no earthly power could withhold, proclaiming amongst the peoples that verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی اشرق من افق الظهور بسلطان ما منعته قوه العالم ینطق بین الامم انه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @high station of the true believer, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @rejection, opposition and persecution
